dashboard.intro: Add positions on the review screen: pick equipment from the catalog or type a custom description (e.g. steel profile with dimensions). Excel paste is available via Import.
dashboard.privacy: CargoPilot does not store history, pasted data, or appendix files on the server. After download, everything is discarded from memory.

login.title: Sign in
login.setup: No admin configured. Set ADMIN_USERNAME, ADMIN_EMAIL and ADMIN_PASSWORD.

wizard.strictBlocked: Strict mode: fix errors before continuing.
wizard.flagsIntro: Set Y/N flags per line. Help text is taken from the appendix template (Invulinstructie sheet).
wizard.dgIntro: Complete appendix D for all lines with dangerous goods (UN number).
wizard.dgSource: UN data can be fetched automatically from the ADR database (FreightUtils).
wizard.dgVehicleHelp: Description of the vehicle or load as in appendix D.
wizard.dgIncluded: Appendix D will be included for {{count}} line(s).

questions.selectHint: Check the positions this applies to.
questions.stackable: Are one or more positions stackable?
questions.rotatable: Are one or more positions tiltable?
questions.weapons: Do one or more positions contain weapons or weapon systems?
questions.weaponsPick: Which positions contain weapons or weapon systems?
questions.conditioned: Must one or more positions be transported conditioned?
questions.dangerous_goods: Do one or more positions contain dangerous goods?
questions.ammunition: Do one or more positions contain ammunition?
questions.itar: Do one or more positions contain ITAR items?
questions.tbb: Do one or more positions contain TBB?
questions.temperatureHint: Enter minimum and maximum temperature (°C) per selected position.
questions.tbbHint: Enter the TBB category per selected position.

review.intro: Type in the field to search equipment, profiles, materials and references. Synonyms are recognized; add dimensions to narrow results.
review.descriptionPlaceholder: Pick equipment or type e.g. steel angle 80x80x8x6000
review.noEquipmentMatch: No catalog match — free description will be used
review.noCatalogMatch: No catalog match — free description will be used
review.noLines: Add at least one line with a description.
review.importHint: Paste copied columns from Excel (description | quantity | unit), or download the template and upload a file.

messages.dg_un_detected: UN number detected — appendix D is mandatory

materieel.intro: Equipment database from the appendix template (Overzicht Materieel sheet). Items are recognized when pasted in the wizard, e.g. "Skoda Yeti".
materieel.search: Search by name, SAP code or alias…
materieel.importHint: Download the template first, fill in your equipment, then upload the file (.xlsx, .csv or .txt). Existing items are updated by SAP code or specifications.

settings.title: Settings
settings.intro: Customize the app appearance and language.
settings.themeHint: Choose light, dark, or follow system settings.
settings.autoDetectNote: In the wizard, the input language of your material list is always detected automatically.
